channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: New street light is not working during the night, 7th May
item.description:
New street night works on in the day and not on at night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beechfield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hunts Slip Road, Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Thurlow Park Road SE21 8JL in front of houses 91/ 93, 7th May
item.description:
Thurlow Park Road SE21 8JL in front of houses 91/ 93 / 95 is a white painted concrete front wall at the front of the property which is graffiti tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture and Google Streetview link: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.43934,-0.0989693,3a,75y,345.18h,92.69t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sW0_bIa61-h68Db1M6AVszA!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D-2.6857280337412703%26panoid%3DW0_bIa61-h68Db1M6AVszA%26yaw%3D345.1767533830225!7i16384!8i8192?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDUwMi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thurlow Park Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture left on pavement, fly tipped, 7th May
item.description:
Issue already raised, council closing down issues when they are not fixed. Item of furniture is still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Streatham High Rd SW16 1PN number 63 Streatham, 7th May
item.description:
Streatham High Rd SW16 1PN number 63 Streatham Library stone frontage towards Pinfold Road corner Streatham High Road graffiti filth tagged – Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Streatham High Road, Streatham, Greater London

item.title: Unreal parking, 7th May
item.description:
Disabled badge, red zone and time limit long past

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches, 7th May
item.description:
Trees are overgrown to the extent it's difficult to pass and have to walk around near the road, which makes it dangerous.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Hall Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture on public pathway, 7th May
item.description:
Dismantled wardrobe white, been there for a couple of months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dalberg Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot of paint spillage on public pathway, 7th May
item.description:
Happened recently this needs to be cleaned up as kids and animals could walk in this. Please send cleaning team as well as soon as possible

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydney Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Bins and fly-tipping, 7th May
item.description:
Bins left on the pavement are overflowing and attracting fly-tippers. In Southwark, bins should not be permanently stored on the pavement; they must be kept within property boundaries and only put on collection day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83,85,87,89,91, Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A male who lives in this prison cell of a house was seen vandalizing parking enforcement signs. He gets more free parking. Please address this issues., 7th May
item.description:
Parking sign need replacing. Graffiti. Vandalism.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Semley Gate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping rubbish, 7th May
item.description:
The ground floor tenants at 106, Croydon Road keep dumping their rubbish in the street. It has happened a few times this week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Beeches Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 83 Chesterfield Grove-Larfe Tree Branch Broken, 7th May
item.description:
Large broken tree branch is causing an obstruction on the pavement and needs to be removed. ( it is currently behind a bin but sometimes it is on the pavement)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping and Overflowing Bin, 7th May
item.description:
Flytipping and ineffective refuse services are becoming a regular blight on Plough Way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp posts all out, 7th May
item.description:
Serveral lamp posts out, road is very dark
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
